diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Raises possibility of pregnancy, a prerequisite for ectopic pregnancy.
Specific sign of diaphragmatic irritation from intra-abdominal blood.

symptoms.symptom_name: Positive urine pregnancy test, RIF tenderness with rebound, tachycardia and borderline hypotension

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Objective confirmation; clinician-only findings sealed from telehealth chat.

symptom_clusters.clinical_significance: Amenorrhoea, abnormal bleeding, presyncope, and shoulder tip pain together strongly confirm ectopic pregnancy with early intra-abdominal bleeding, requiring emergency transport.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Immediate urine/serum beta-hCG and transvaginal ultrasound in the Emergency Department
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Confirms pregnancy location and detects free pelvic fluid/adnexal mass.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Group and hold/crossmatch blood and gynaecological surgical review
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Prepares for possible emergency surgery given signs of bleeding.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Reassurance that this is a normal period and advice to monitor at home
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Would dangerously delay treatment of a life-threatening surgical emergency.
